cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which present Alice ends up with after all those swaps. Let me start by keeping track of each person's present step by step. Initially, the presents are: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: yellow - Dave: purple - Eve: pink ball Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Alice and Dave swap. So Alice gives her white present to Dave, and Dave gives his purple present to Alice. After this swap: - Alice has purple - Dave has white Others remain the same: Bob green, Claire yellow, Eve pink. Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. Now, Claire (yellow) swaps with Dave (white). So
